Senior Data Engineer – Cloud & Analytics

Company: TechCorp Inc.
Location: Remote (USA)
Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Role:
We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our growing Data Platform team.
You will design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines that power our
analytics and machine learning products.

Required Skills:
- Python (5+ years)
- Apache Spark / PySpark
- SQL and data modelling
- Cloud platforms: AWS or GCP
- Data pipeline orchestration (Apache Airflow)
- Experience with dbt (data build tool)
- Git and CI/CD practices

Preferred Skills:
- Kafka or other event streaming platforms
- Kubernetes / Docker
- Experience with Databricks
- Knowledge of data governance and data quality frameworks

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement batch and streaming data pipelines
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to deliver data products
- Optimise existing pipelines for performance and cost
- Maintain data documentation and lineage
- Mentor junior engineers

Seniority: Senior (5–8 years experience)
